## Runtime.RuntimeMoldedBonBon class

A resolved view of a molded bonbon confection with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeMoldedBonBon extends RuntimeConfectionBase implements IRuntimeMoldedBonBon 
```
**Extends:** [RuntimeConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.runtime.runtimeconfectionbase.md)

**Implements:** [IRuntimeMoldedBonBon](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimemoldedbonbon.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeMoldedBonBon` class.
